About Organization

The Indian Army is the land-based branch and the largest component of the Indian Armed Forces. The President of India serves as the Supreme Commander of the Indian Army.

About the Programme

The Indian Army NCC Special Entry 125th Course is a government job opportunity for NCC cadets. The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the Indian Army.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The Indian Army NCC Special Entry 125th Course is a great opportunity for NCC cadets to serve the nation. The programme offers a chance to work with the Indian Army and gain valuable experience. However, the selection process is competitive, and candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to apply.

The programme is a great way to develop skills and knowledge in the field of defence. Candidates who are interested in pursuing a career in the Indian Army should apply for this programme. The application process is online, and candidates must submit their application form before the deadline.
